testcase.name: test_02_create_user_with_employee_record

failure.message: AssertionError: User should have employee_id field assert 'employee_id' in {'commission_rate_override': None, 'created_at': '2026-02-22T21:01:05.422970Z', 'department': 'Sales', 'email': 'test.sync.1771794065@clt-academy.com', ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_user_employee_sync.py:91: in test_02_create_user_with_employee_record assert "employee_id" in user, "User should have employee_id field" E AssertionError: User should have employee_id field E assert 'employee_id' in {'commission_rate_override': None, 'created_at': '2026-02-22T21:01:05.422970Z', 'department': 'Sales', 'email': 'test.sync.1771794065@clt-academy.com', ...}

testcase.name: test_01_create_employee_with_user_account

failure.message: AssertionError: Employee should have user_id when create_user_account=true assert None is not None + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf8542910ae40>('user_id') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf8542910ae40> = {'annual_leave_balance': 30.0, 'bank_details': None, 'company_email': 'emp.sync.1771794069@clt-academy.com', 'confirmation_date': None, ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_user_employee_sync.py:515: in test_01_create_employee_with_user_account assert employee.get("user_id") is not None, "Employee should have user_id when create_user_account=true" E AssertionError: Employee should have user_id when create_user_account=true E assert None is not None E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf8542910ae40>('user_id') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf8542910ae40> = {'annual_leave_balance': 30.0, 'bank_details': None, 'company_email': 'emp.sync.1771794069@clt-academy.com', 'confirmation_date': None, ...}.get
